h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it: the sentence is not pressure just because it sits in the complaint file; the file has to show it being aimed at someone.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to systematically analyze the archival marks to distinguish custody from active use.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: In the tray, “attached” only keeps papers moving together. At the claims desk, the same slip changes status if it says “for response,” names an office, or requires a reply.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor responds to the learner's confusion about the attachment mark by physically demonstrating its dual status depending on its location and text.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
